description_long: This is a rustic, artisanal loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a dusting of flour on its surface. The crust appears uneven and rugged, with some areas showing a slightly glossy finish and others more matte, suggesting a hand-formed, oven-baked process. The interior is visible from one side, revealing a soft, airy crumb with irregular holes and embedded dark inclusions, likely olives or nuts. The loaf is roughly semicircular in shape, with a domed top and a flat bottom, typical of country-style or ciabatta bread. The exterior is mottled with lighter and darker brown patches, and the flour dusting gives it a rustic, homemade appearance. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or labels on the bread.
description: A rustic, golden-brown loaf of bread with a thick, flour-dusted crust and an airy, holey interior. The surface is rugged and artisanal, with visible inclusions and a homemade appearance.
description_view_0: The cut side of the bread is visible, showing a soft, airy crumb with irregular holes and dark inclusions.
description_view_1: This view highlights the domed, flour-dusted crust with a rugged, uneven surface and some glossy patches.
description_view_2: The back of the loaf is shown, featuring a broad, rounded crust with a matte, floury finish and no visible cut.
description_view_3: A side view of the bread, emphasizing the thick, golden-brown crust and the rustic, uneven texture.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rugged, with a mottled golden-brown color and a dusting of white flour. There are no visible scoring marks, but the surface is uneven and rustic, with some glossy and some matte patches.
